title: sticks to planks
description: This is a mod that adds a recipe where you can make planks out of sticks.
body: This is a crafting recipe mod to make planks out of sticks! All you do is place 4 sticks (don't stack them) and you can make planks. (Note that this requires Polymorth to have access to all the recipes to make every plank, if not you can only craft the first type of planks you crafted with the sticks) Made with MCREATOR.
